info.title: MeepleAI API
info.description: AI-powered board game rules assistant API with RAG-based question answering, rule explanations, and chess analysis

ApiKey.description: API key authentication via Authorization: ApiKey <key> header. Browser clients can also rely on the secure meeple_apikey cookie issued during API key login.
ApiKey.name: Authorization

Cookie.description: Cookie-based session authentication for web clients
Cookie.name: meepleai_session
